name: Dungeon Miner - Idle Mining Game
description: Dungeon Miner is a management simulation game. Your late uncle has left you a mine to teach you all about hard work and earning your fortune. Now grab your pickaxe and delve deep into all the areas on your piece of land. Craft new weapons and tools, explore dungeons to find valuables and blueprints, fight creatures, upgrade your gear and embark on an exciting adventure. Dungeon Miner will never get boring as it's laden with rich content and many surprises for you to explore.
tags: Adventure, Boy, Boys, Fun, Kid, Kids, Mine, Miner
